Proposed Strategic Investment Term Sheet between Haiyun Autonomics Co., Ltd. (USCC: 92134400MA9K3N7X2Q, SZSE ChiNext issuer) and Qidian Lake Capital (Shenzhen) Ltd. (USCC: 91440300MA7R2D6B1M).
Structure and Amount: Qidian Lake Capital to subscribe RMB 320,000,000 of new A-shares representing approximately 12% post-issuance on a non-public offering (定向增发) basis.
Pricing: Issue price to be set in accordance with SZSE/CSRC non-public issuance rules using the 20 trading day benchmark, subject to board approval and CSRC registration.
Use of Proceeds: Expansion of autonomous sorting lines and R&D for edge AI controllers, with no proceeds used for financial investments unrelated to principal business.
Disclosure Timing: Issuer to publish a board resolution announcement within two trading days via SZSE designated media (including 巨潮资讯网), and to follow subsequent CSRC registration disclosures per applicable timelines.
MNPI and Materiality: Until the first exchange-designated announcement, this term sheet and related financial terms constitute 未公开内幕信息 and 重大事项 for the issuer given expected proceeds >20% of latest audited net assets; an 内幕信息知情人名单 will be established and maintained.
Selective Disclosure: No selective disclosure is permitted; no analyst calls, WeChat/微信群 briefings, or 深交所互动易 posts discussing this transaction before disclosure; standard response will be “以公司公告为准.”
Blackout Windows: Directors, supervisors, senior management, and insiders are restricted from trading during 窗口期 (10 trading days before and 2 trading days after periodic reports) and during the major transaction筹划期 per issuer policy and SZSE guidance.
Conditions Precedent: Completion of CSRC registration, SZSE self-regulatory review, and SAMR anti-monopoly notification if thresholds are triggered; no state-owned asset supervision approvals are required based on current shareholder structure.
Cross-Border Data and CAC: Any due diligence involving personal information will follow PIPL/CSL/DSL principles of necessity and minimization; no minors under 14 will be included; any cross-border transfer (if unavoidable) will undergo CAC 安全评估 or use 标准合同 as applicable, and no resident ID numbers or biometric data will be exported.
Employment and ESOP: Post-closing ESOP expansion up to 8% subject to shareholder approval; HR will collect only necessary PI for grant administration, with localized storage in the PRC and de-identification for vendor processing.
Public Reference: As disclosed in the issuer’s 2025-03-12 临时公告 on SZSE regarding Phase II Suzhou plant capacity planning, that operational information is already public and does not alter the MNPI status of this term sheet.
Press Release Context: Qidian Lake Capital’s general 2025-04-01 press release about exploring “smart manufacturing” in the Greater Bay Area is non-specific and does not constitute public disclosure of this transaction.
Sector Update: The Provincial DRC’s 2025-05-10 guidance on green logistics is industry-wide and, absent issuer-specific quantified impacts, is not treated as issuer MNPI.
Confidentiality and Info Barriers: 60-day exclusivity applies; parties will implement information barriers and restricted lists; no media engagement until the first SZSE announcement; breach of confidentiality triggers a RMB 10,000,000 break fee.
Long-Stop Date and Closing: Long-stop date is 150 days from board approval; closing is conditioned on receipt of all regulatory approvals and completion of funds settlement through designated accounts.
Contacts: Mr. Zhao Yichen, CFO, Haiyun Autonomics, zhao.yichen@haiyun-autonomics.cn; Ms. Chen Rui, Managing Director, Qidian Lake Capital, chen.rui@qidianlakecap.cn.
